_comment: Supportive lines shown when a budget is over its limit. Firewall rule: these NEVER shame. They acknowledge, normalize, and point forward. No blame words, no 'you failed', no guilt. The app dramatizes overspend as a monster getting enraged elsewhere — the words to the user stay kind.
lines: Over on this one — it happens. Next month’s a fresh start.
This budget ran hot. Worth a look, not a worry.
A little over here. You’ll know for next time.
Past the limit on this budget — every month teaches something.
Overspent, and that’s okay. You’re still tracking, still in control.
This one went over. The fact that you logged it is the win.
Above the line here — adjust when you’re ready, no rush.
Budgets bend some months. You’ve got the whole picture.
